description.value:
The classic knight's blade, balanced for versatile use in one or two hands. Reliable in all situations, the longsword rewards technical fighters who excel at controlling their opponents.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Melee d6, Slashing
BasicOne-Handed, Melee d8, Versatile d10, Balanced, Disarm
MasterOne-Handed, Melee d8, Versatile d10, Balanced, Disarm â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkCritical hit range becomes 19-20 when wielded one-handed, and 18-20 when wielded two-handed.

rmeData.masterPerk: Critical hit range becomes 19-20 when wielded one-handed, and 18-20 when wielded two-handed.
